content: Read Chapter 7 of 'Clean Code' — focus on writing small, single-purpose functions.
Review different types of SQL joins — especially LEFT and FULL OUTER joins.
Watch lecture on consensus algorithms — try to summarize Paxos in your own words.
Figure out the difference between python async and multi threading.
Draft blog post: '3 Things I Learned About Writing Better Functions.'
Ask Aram about good beginner-friendly open-source projects to contribute to.
